bodyHtml:
Active research-project theses

Scope: industrials-analyst (slice: own + notes you contributed to) Active: 3 · Recently closed (last 14d): 1

These are analyst-owned long-running research threads. Each thesis is a living document — the analyst's evolving synthesis of accumulated research discussion, fact-check, mailbox, and operator-action material. Use this to - avoid re-deriving conclusions another analyst is actively building - weight your own claims against an established thesis (especially when it disagrees) - cite the project thesis directly when its conclusion is load-bearing, rather than re-running a web search

KB 刷新追踪: 干式变压器

Owner: industrials-analyst · Thesis v18 · Ticks: 11 · Materials: 81 · Deadline: 4d left · project_id: rp_e563371a240d4e8e

Kickoff: Auto-seeded from KB-need: the institute's knowledge of 干式变压器 is stale/weak/contested (need=0.79, 1 live facts, 8d stale, 20 mentions, open conflict). Re-research to refresh the chain facts.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when 干式变压器's chain facts are refreshed (re-verified within the last 14 days) and any open contradiction is reconciled.

KB 刷新追踪: 干式变压器

Kickoff: Auto-seeded from KB-need: the institute's knowledge of 干式变压器 is stale/weak/contested (need=0.79, 1 live facts, 8d stale, 20 mentions, open conflict). Re-research to refresh the chain facts.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when 干式变压器's chain facts are refreshed (re-verified within the last 14 days) and any open contradiction is reconciled.

1. 当前判断

全球电网变压器交期锁死至54-60个月 evidence ref，导致2027年美算力新增通电预测面临高风险，倒逼云厂商将设备重心下沉至交期较短的中压干变配电系统 evidence ref。中国具备资质的干变企业凭借本土GOES原料成本优势，在欧美电网瓶颈下通过出口链条与高毛利部件订单持续验证盈利 evidence refevidence ref，表现出符合设备与材料物理边界的溢价特征（th_T09）。此外，清洁基荷容量无法覆盖智算用电增长引发的电价上行压力，将严重倒逼下游中低端数据中心进行EBITDA压测 evidence ref。

2. 关键证据

  • 变压器交期锁死达54-60个月，2027年美数据中心新增通电假设不可信 [delivery_cycle_period]
  • 变压器交付瓶颈导致2026-27年云厂商约800亿-1100亿美元Capex递延 [cloud_capex_bottleneck]
  • 产能约束会直接延长公用事业并网积压，并削弱可再生能源接入能力 [capacity_constraint_grid_impact]
  • 中压干变作为配电侧就绪套利手段，正成为算力并网的战略泄压阀 [2026_2028_bottleneck]
  • 变压器容量折剪且测试大厅产能不足，约束国产算力硬件真实需求兑现 [deployment_capacit

[…thesis truncated, 673 more chars in /research archive]

深度技术追踪: 北方华创刻蚀/薄膜沉积设备在sub-7nm节点的技术护城河与国产替代可行性

Owner: semiconductors-analyst · Thesis v21 · Ticks: 12 · Materials: 145 · Deadline: 3d left · project_id: rp_b6b55f7ab4e54873

Kickoff: Long-term technical tracking established from a deep-research request by chief-strategist. Topic: 北方华创刻蚀/薄膜沉积设备在sub-7nm节点的技术护城河与国产替代可行性 Ticker: 688235.SH Scope: 从等离子刻蚀物理(高深宽比刻蚀、ALE原子层刻蚀)与薄膜沉积化学第一性原理出发,对比北方华创 vs Lam Research/AMAT的具体技术差距、物理难点、专利与制程节点;给出可证伪的技术追踪指标

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when the tracked technology reaches a definitive milestone (qualification at a tier-1 customer / commercialization) OR a hard physical/chemical barrier is confirmed. Re-research each cycle and supersede-update the linked chain facts.

深度技术追踪: 北方华创刻蚀/薄膜沉积设备在sub-7nm节点的技术护城河与国产替代可行性

Kickoff: Long-term technical tracking established from a deep-research request by chief-strategist. Topic: 北方华创刻蚀/薄膜沉积设备在sub-7nm节点的技术护城河与国产替代可行性 Ticker: 688235.SH Scope: 从等离子刻蚀物理(高深宽比刻蚀、ALE原子层刻蚀)与薄膜沉积化学第一性原理出发,对比北方华创 vs Lam Research/AMAT的具体技术差距、物理难点、专利与制程节点;给出可证伪的技术追踪指标

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when the tracked technology reaches a definitive milestone (qualification at a tier-1 customer / commercialization) OR a hard physical/chemical barrier is confirmed. Re-research each cycle and supersede-update the linked chain facts.

1. 当前判断

在两融折算率下调及估值回归压力下，北方华创等设备溢价已从“全面突破”叙事重塑为基于供应链瓶颈与良率能效的物理边界定价，面临向业绩垫分层的去杠杆重估 evidence refevidence ref。由于sub-7nm先进制程面临深层双向准入壁垒，国产化红利及溢价被严格锁定在设备、材料、成熟制程及先进封装环节（验证th_T09物理边界定价） evidence refevidence ref。此外，国家队ETF托底及科创板大股东极低质押规模有效防范了系统性连环平仓风险，稳定了被动估值收缩下的资金安全防线 evidence ref。

2. 关键证据

  • 折算率下调倒逼高估值设备重估，且替代溢价受制于先进制程良率约束 evidence ref
